name: I talked to insurance adjuster after chemical exposure - did I mess up?
description: Get lawyer ASAP; don't give more info[6].

mainEntity.name: I talked to insurance adjuster after chemical exposure - did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get lawyer ASAP; don't give more info[6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; statements can be used against you without lawyer.** Recorded calls common[6]. **Key factors:** Avoid details pre-attorney. **Practical guidance:** Say little, get lawyer now to correct record. Don't sign releases. **Adjusters minimize claims.**
